description: User Requirement Specification library for V-model protocol generation.

requirements.title: Sterilization cycle intended use
requirements.statement: Equipment shall sterilize defined load families using validated pre-vacuum steam cycles.

requirements.title: Critical process parameter control
requirements.statement: Equipment shall monitor and control temperature, pressure, and exposure time within validated limits.

requirements.title: Utility and environment suitability
requirements.statement: Equipment shall operate with qualified utilities and the defined installation environment.

requirements.title: Data integrity for electronic records
requirements.statement: When electronic records are used, the system shall support secure access, audit trail, and retrievable records.

requirements.title: Throughput and capacity
requirements.statement: Equipment shall support planned production throughput while maintaining validated state.
